Records.description: Two-loop planar double-box with six internal propagators (five massive of equal mass m, one massless) and four external legs (three massless p1,p2,p3 and one massive p4 with p4^2 = mh^2). Originally computed in Bonciani et al. (1605.03157). The IBP reduction yields four master integrals; in d=4 the equation for I_4 decouples and the maximal cut of I_3 (which contains a dotted internal triangle subdiagram) vanishes, reducing the system to two coupled first-order homogeneous equations for I_1 and I_2. The maximal cut of I_1 is computed by first cutting the inner one-loop triangle and then localizing the remaining three delta-functions, producing a one-fold integral over a square root of a quartic in k_0. After standard change of variables one obtains F_1 = EllipticK(omega)/sqrt(s^2(mh^2-t)^2 - 4 m^2 s [mh^2(s-t)+t(s+t) - 2 sqrt(-s t u mh^2)]) (Eq. 4.36), with omega given by Eq. 4.37. A second independent solution F_2 = EllipticK(1-omega)/sqrt(...) is also constructed, and equivalent representations F1tilde, F2tilde involving EllipticK(1/omega), EllipticK(1-1/omega) are given (Eq. 4.43). The result agrees with Bonciani et al. for parameter alpha=1.
Records.familyName: elliptic planar two-loop double box with massive internal propagators
